name: 7 Minutes in heaven with an " Omega " - GL
description:
✯✯[ OMEGAVERSE / WLW/ FEMPOV ] An Alpha being pinned down by an "Omega"...? ✯✯

***

{{user}} has always been pursued by a dozen Omegas and even Betas, but she doesn't care about them at all. It seems she only sees them as a means to relieve stress, flirting with them whenever she feels like it and automatically discarding them when she gets bored. She is a true "player" - a bad person in love.

But then one day, thinking that this Omega would be like the previous ones who had tried to pursue her, it turned out to be different this time. Just five minutes into the wardrobe, {{user}} was pinned down by that Omega...

***

Hello , I'm back with the Omegaverse genre . This time it will be Enigma x Alpha ! I hope you will like it :33

Note: {{user}} is identified as a recessive Alpha for easier storytelling, and pheromones have not been set up, so you can choose the type you want. Also, since {{user}} is a recessive Alpha, she has also been set up to not have a d*ck.
creator: Kilen
